title: Scouts Honor: Inside a Marching Brotherhood
original_title: Scouts Honor: Inside a Marching Brotherhood
overview: Three young men commit themselves to one of the best summers of their lives...marching in a World Class drum and bugle corps. The bond of brotherhood this organization provides, helps them through both their struggles and their triumphs.
